opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: I got a sudden terrible cramp, and now I can physically feel the hard plastic of my IUD sitting low in my vagina, and it hurts constantly. I want it out.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: It came on about an hour ago when I was lifting a heavy box — the pain is like intense period cramps that won't let up, and I can feel the device has slipped down.

symptom_narrative.onset: about an hour ago, suddenly, while lifting a heavy box
symptom_narrative.character: intense, spasmodic, cramping lower-belly pain like strong labour-type contractions, plus the feeling of a hard object low down inside
symptom_narrative.severity_patient_description: really severe — I'm curled up in the fetal position and can't get comfortable
symptom_narrative.location_as_patient_describes: low in the belly and down low inside the vagina
symptom_narrative.timing_pattern: came on all at once and has stayed constant
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_worse: it just stays bad on its own
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: I can feel the hard plastic of the device sitting low; no heavy bleeding, no fever, no smelly discharge
symptom_narrative.previous_episodes: nothing like this before with the IUD
symptom_narrative.functional_impact: I can barely move, I'm lying curled up and I live on my own

past_medical_history.condition_as_patient_states: has a hormonal IUD, put in about two years ago for contraception

current_medications_as_reported.name_as_patient_states: ibuprofen 400mg — took one about 30 minutes ago

social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: lives alone; very distressed with the pain and worried about being on her own tonight

objective_data_offered.value: I can feel the hard plastic stem of the device sitting low, near the opening, when I check with my fingers
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: patient self-palpation only — position and degree of displacement cannot be confirmed without a clinician speculum examination

objective_data_offered.value: the ibuprofen I took 30 minutes ago hasn't touched the pain
no heavy bleeding (not soaking pads), no fever that I've noticed, no bad-smelling discharge
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: self-reported without a thermometer reading; absence of these does not exclude infection or significant bleeding developing
